name: 100% Parmesan Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Teaspoon Black Pepper or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Spray a 15x10x1-inch baking pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Dip each chicken breast half in melted butter, then coat with the combined remaining ingredients.
4. Place the coated chicken breasts in the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
6. Makes 6 servings.
SPICY: Substitute 1/8 to 1/4 teaspoon ground red pepper flakes for black pepper.
Variation: Brush with Miracle Whip or mayonnaise instead of butter.
